---
title: Bone Remodeling
authors:
  - name: Akeema Hamlin
    affiliation: The University
    roles: writing
    corresponding: true
bibliography: references.bib
---

|  |
|------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| "Bone Remodeling: Akeema Hamlin |
| \## Why is Bones Remodeling Important |
| \- Repairs damaged bone - Maintains bone strength - Helps regulate calcium levels in the blood |

## Cells Involved in bone Remodeling

-   Osteoclasts -\> break down old bone
-   Osteoblasts -\> build new bone
-   Osteocytes -\> maintain bone tissue

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Bone Remodeling Process

1 .Activation - remodeling begins

2\. Resorption - osteoblasts break down bone

## Calcium and Bone Remodeling

-   Bone store calcium
-   When the body needs calcium, bone is broken down
-   Calcium is released into the bloodstream

## Factors That Affect Bone Remodeling

-   Age
-   Diet (calcium and vitamin D)
-   Physical activity
-   Hormones

## Bone Remodeling and Health

-   Imbalance can cause bone diseases
-   Example : Osteoporosis (bones become weak and fragile)

### Conclusion

-   Bone remodeling is essential for maintaining healthy bones
-   It keeps bones strong and supports overall body function

[@knuth84].
